last_commit.message: fix: replace batch extraction with browser download in fetch-bookmarks skill

recent_changes: Bookmark fetch 2026-02-26: 13 NEW tweets imported (auto-memory, git worktree support, Claude-in-Chrome Quick Mode, remote-control, session deletion PSA, Seedance V2 skill, continual learning, etc.)
Enrichment: 13/13 keywords, 13/13 summaries, 8/9 links resolved. Vault export: 484 notes (up from 470)
Analysis: 13 tweets classified — 1 ACT_NOW (cleanupPeriodDays), 6 EXPERIMENT, 6 NOTED, 0 NOISE
Skill update: fetch-bookmarks Phase 5 now uses Blob download workaround (javascript_tool output limit ~1500 chars)
Skill update: /wrap-up now includes git push as final step (fixed known issue)
known_issues: 4 tweets have empty text — genuinely attachment-only replies, not a parsing bug
Quote tweets not captured in schema or extraction (only quote_count stored)
44 links (41%) still lack LLM summaries — 19 are media URLs (unfetchable), 25 are x.com/tweet links
17+ media items lack vision analysis — limited by missing local_path
Obsidian v1.11.7 installed — needs update to 1.12+ for CLI support
Briefing generator produces double @@ in author handles
Pre-compact hook may not capture enough structured context (only STATUS.json)
